emails.subject: Flight Prices
emails.body: Flight Prices Continental has a price of $297.17(non-refundable) for the following roundtrip flights: Depart Houston, Nov. 8 1:40 PM 4:08 PM Depart Chicago, Nov. 11 11:05 AM 1:38 PM United has a price of $259.12 (non-refundable) for the following roundtrip flights: Depart Houston, Nov. 8 12:50 PM 3:15 PM or 2:40 PM 5:02 PM Depart Chicago, Nov. 11 10:35 AM 1:11 PM Let me know what you decide. Thank you, Irena Hogan Sr. Administrative Assistant Enron Americas (713) 853-6143
